note: Lodging + camping. tier: camp | value | comfort | premium (maps to config.json). season = [openMonth, closeMonth] inclusive; omit = year-round. Medora properties from medora.com/stay. Most TRMF properties book through the central reservations line.

lodging.name: Rough Riders Hotel
lodging.blurb: Luxury meets Western charm in the restored 1885 hotel on Medora's main street — the town's signature stay.

lodging.name: Ferris Inn
lodging.blurb: Medora's most historic stay — where Teddy Roosevelt lodged while visiting town, each room honoring a piece of the story.

lodging.name: Hotel 1883
lodging.blurb: New in 2026 — steps from the National Park, the Medora Musical, and the Presidential Library.

lodging.name: Hyde House
lodging.blurb: Nestled into downtown Medora, seconds from the Old West action by day and a quiet home by night.

lodging.name: Wooly Boys Inn
lodging.blurb: Named for the movie filmed in the Badlands — a unique downtown inn.

lodging.name: Badlands Motel
lodging.blurb: Drive right up to your door. Western charm, walkable to downtown, with pet-friendly rooms available.

lodging.name: Elkhorn Quarters
lodging.blurb: Named for TR's ranch — a 'tiny-house style' stay Teddy would applaud for its efficiency.

lodging.name: Medora Campground
lodging.blurb: The newly expanded campground within walking distance of town, under large cottonwoods.

lodging.name: Conestoga Wagons at Medora Campground
lodging.blurb: A modern-day settler's paradise — sleep in a covered wagon along the Little Missouri.

lodging.name: Cabins at the Medora Campground
lodging.blurb: Experience the Badlands cabin-style, just like TR did — within walking distance of town.

lodging.name: Red Trail Campground
lodging.blurb: Full-hookup RV and tent camping a block off Medora's main street.

lodging.name: Sully Creek State Park Campground
lodging.blurb: Riverside sites and the Maah Daah Hey trailhead, 3 miles south of town — good for horses.

lodging.name: Cottonwood Campground (TRNP South Unit)
lodging.blurb: The National Park Service campground inside the South Unit, along the Little Missouri.

lodging.name: Juniper Campground (TRNP North Unit)
lodging.blurb: Quiet NPS campground in the North Unit, 70 miles north.

lodging.name: Dickinson chain hotels
lodging.blurb: A cluster of national-brand hotels 40 minutes east — the fallback when Medora is full in peak summer.
